rows.label: tev035801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Biiponne about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Biiponne about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Biiponne about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev035801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Biiponne about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Sparkly! Sparkly! You're all so
beautiful again today, are you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Oh! I bet you just heard me say
something strange to myself, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, it's a fairly important
job, actually? Hee hee! I'll
tell you about it soon enough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0008
rows.name:
My daughter Panyal just just
LOVES human fashion, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0009
rows.name:
But no matter what she tries on, it ends up
clashing. Human clothes and Ma-non bodies just
don't seem to match quite right, I suppose?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0010
rows.name:
But Panyal is no quitter—I believe she decided to
to go to the commercial district to find a Ma-non-
compatible wardrobe? I hope she has good luck...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0015
rows.name:
Do you see that thing sparkling
in the middle of the room?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0016
rows.name:
That's the Ma-non ship's power source,
you see? It is most precious to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0017
rows.name:
The energy it produces gets converted
into a more usable form by devices in
the ship's hull, if you follow?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Ah! I can see this interests you!
I know this because your face is
starting to sparkle too, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0025
rows.name:
The sparklies are the source
of the ship's energy, okay?
And the sparklies are alive![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0026
rows.name:
Ma-non ships use the energy emitted by
the sparklies when they're happy, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0027
rows.name:
They're more powerful and ecologically
sound than any of of your human energy
sources. Impressive, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0028
rows.name:
We found them 500 light-years
away, you see? Far far far far
far FAR across the cosmos.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Uh-oh. The sparklies don't like it when I talk
about old times, do they? Well, I don't want them
upset, so I'm going to to stop now, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Biiponne about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thank you for looking out for for Panyal. It
pleases a mother to see her daughter find a
worthwhile career path, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Did you know she gave me a bottle of this
"perfume" substance as a thank-you for
helping out with with the measurements?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0013
rows.name:
It tastes so bitter, but I
suppose one must suffer for
the sake of beauty, am I right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035801_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Hmm? It's not for drinking?! BLEEEEEEEEECH!
Maybe you should write that on the label
next time, don't you think?![ST:wait ]
